Concept: Repurpose Scrap

Creator

Description

This is scrap from the repurposing process.

Usage List:

  • Appears as Repurpose Scrap in Diagram Repair Battery in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Repurpose Scrap in Diagram Repurpose in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Repurpose Scrap in Diagram Recover Materials/Devices in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Repurpose Scrap in Diagram Recycle in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Repurpose Scrap in Diagram Pretreat Battery in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Repurpose Scrap in Diagram Pyrometallurgy in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Repurpose Scrap in Diagram Repurpose Battery in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
